nodes.label: phase4-opinion (author reflection)
nodes.rationale: The author's prescient pre-research reflection: context decay with depth, the residual/bypass fix, the decider-GD lazy-depth idea, the Hippocampus loop / correctness-as-feeling threshold.

nodes.label: Correctness is a feeling (the I-get-it threshold)
nodes.rationale: The 1am-8am insight: a mind is a loop (hold a little, call from memory, compare, reject, search) until a learned, fallible feeling of confidence says stop - the seed of the north-star recurrent brain and the 'I get it' halting threshold.
